summary: Save a custom template as a regular template
description: Save a custom template as a regular template. Endpoint: POST /c/{company_id}/offers/{offer_id}/referral_templates/save_as_template. Required parameters: name, offer_id, company_id. Optional parameters include category.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the newly created template

params.name: category
params.description: Category of the newly created template (optional)
